name: firm
description: Business-as-code work management system. Model organizations, projects, and tasks as a graph and query them with a declarative DSL.

adapterConfig.missingDependencyHelp: Install firm: brew tap 42futures/firm && brew install firm

commands.description: Initialize a firm workspace in the current directory

commands.description: Add an entity to the workspace

commands.description: List entities of a given type

adapterConfig.missingDependencyHelp: Install firm: brew tap 42futures/firm && brew install firm

args.name: type
args.description: Entity type to list (e.g. organization, project, task)

commands.description: Query workspace data using the firm DSL

adapterConfig.missingDependencyHelp: Install firm: brew tap 42futures/firm && brew install firm

args.name: query
args.description: DSL query expression (e.g. 'from organization | where name contains "Megacorp"')
